quote.text: MÜSTAKİL FUAR/ ORGANİZASYON is above all a success story. Endless energy, professionalism, clear focus on the future, advanced technologies and a strong team. Our clients and business partners can count on us.
quote.author: Dmitry Zavgorodniy

aboutUs.title: WHO WE ARE
paragraphs: MÜSİAD Fair and Event Management is a powerful organisation structure that brings the business world together at national and international scale.

With years of institutional experience, we organise fairs, summits, conferences and B2B business meetings, enabling professionals from different sectors to make the right connections. At every event, we deliver a structure that accelerates participants' business development processes and builds sustainable partnerships.
By adapting to the digitalising business world, we support physical events with digital solutions and design more efficient, measurable and results-oriented experiences for participants.
stats: Events facilitating thousands of business connections
Network of hundreds of thousands of professional visitors
Strong ecosystem with national and international participants
Sector-specific fairs, summits and private B2B meetings
closing: Thanks to our global business network and strong organisational capability, we connect companies operating in different sectors to new markets and business opportunities.

mission.title: OUR MISSION
mission.statement: We design events that connect the business world with the right contacts, produce measurable results and ensure sustainable partnerships.

values.title: OUR VALUES
values.statement: We create maximum value by ensuring every event produces tangible outcomes.

leadership.title: Leadership
leadership.name: Dmitry Zavgorodniy
paragraphs: Dmitry joined the company in November 2017.
He previously held senior management positions at food industry companies such as Tata Global Beverages Eastern Europe, McCain and Mars.
He holds master's degrees in international relations and in economic-political issues.

intro.title: MÜSTAKİL FUAR/ ORGANİZASYON Connect
intro.text: Connect brings together MÜSTAKİL FUAR/ ORGANİZASYON exhibitors and visitors in industry communities. Here, professionals from different sectors build business connections and stay in touch online 365 days a year.

whatIs.title: What is Connect?
bullets: MÜSTAKİL FUAR/ ORGANİZASYON Connect keeps our event communities active throughout the year and brings the industry together in a single hub.
Participants can share relevant content in the feed whether or not they attend the fairs.
We create additional networking opportunities for the industry through carefully curated online expert events.
The platform learns from interactions and suggests better matches and new introductions.

communities.title: Aquaflame Connect
communities.description: Community for professionals in heat, water supply, heating equipment, engineering and pool sectors.

communities.title: MosBuild Connect
communities.description: Community for architects, designers, developers and suppliers

communities.title: TransRussia Connect
communities.description: Community for transport and logistics sector leaders
